meta.title: Dynamic Casaments | Cinematic Wedding Photography & Film in Sabadell and Barcelona
meta.description: Cinematic wedding photography and film in Sabadell and Barcelona. We capture the real emotion of your day so you can relive it forever. Book your date.

hero.title: Your story deserves to be remembered like a film
hero.subtitle: The most important part of a camera is the one standing behind it
hero.description: We capture the real emotion of your day: the glances, the silences, the tears of joy. A cinematic archive to relive, generation after generation.

services.title: Exclusive gifts for the couple
services.description: Every wedding is unique, which is why we design tailor-made packages. These are our base proposals, all of them expandable with the extras that make your day one of a kind.

packages.name: Essential
packages.tagline: The essence of your day, without missing a single moment
features: Private online gallery to share with family and friends

packages.name: Cinematic
packages.tagline: Our most chosen package: photography and film in perfect harmony
features: 10 hours of photography and film coverage
Digital album and private online gallery

packages.name: Signature
packages.tagline: The full experience, without giving anything up

ideas.description: Trends, session ideas and planning tips so every detail of your wedding has its own soul.

gallery.title: Moments that stay forever
gallery.description: A selection of real moments from weddings and celebrations we've had the privilege to photograph.

cinema.title: Stories you can see, feel and remember
cinema.description: Our video portfolio: full documentaries, emotional teasers and aerial shots that bring every moment back to life.

about.title: The most important part of a camera is the one standing behind it
about.description: Dynamic Casaments was born from a conviction: a camera only captures what the eye behind it knows how to see. We're a team of photographers and videographers from Sabadell specialized in weddings, passionate about telling real stories without artifice.
about.paragraph2: We've spent over a decade documenting weddings in Barcelona and across Catalonia. Every project starts with a conversation: we want to get to know you, understand your story and learn which moments you want to last forever. Then, on the day itself, we become invisible so you can live every second with total freedom.

values.title: Authenticity
values.description: Documentary photography over forced poses. Your story, exactly as it happens.

values.title: Closeness
values.description: A warm, personal approach from the first contact through to final delivery.

values.title: Technical excellence
values.description: Professional cinematic gear and an eye trained for light and composition.

values.title: Discretion
values.description: We're present without intruding. The camera disappears, the emotion stays.

testimonials.title: What the couples who trusted us have to say
testimonials.description: Real testimonials from brides and grooms who lived their wedding day with Dynamic Casaments.

items.quote: When we saw the film we cried just like we did on the wedding day itself. They captured moments we didn't even see live. A professional, discreet team with an impressive artistic eye.
From the very first meeting we knew they were the ones. They made us feel comfortable in front of the camera and the result was so much better than we imagined. The 24h teaser moved every guest.
The attention to detail and the sensitivity with which they treated every moment of the day was spectacular. The album is a true work of art we show everyone who visits.

contact.title: Let's start writing your story
contact.description: Tell us your date and your dream wedding idea. We'll get back to you in less than 24 hours.
